enabled.hint: Disable this to stop writing new QQ group events into the plugin database.

group_list_mode.hint: whitelist: only archive listed groups. blacklist: archive every QQ group except the listed ones.

group_list.hint: Each item can be a plain group id like 123456, a full unified session id like onebot:GroupMessage:123456, or platform_id:group_id.

save_raw_event.hint: Recommended. This keeps unsupported QQ segment types such as mface recoverable from the raw payload.

save_media_files.hint: When enabled, images, voice, video, and files are copied into the plugin media directory.

max_media_size_mb.description: Per-file media size limit in MB
max_media_size_mb.hint: Files larger than this limit are recorded as metadata only and will not be copied into plugin storage.

expand_forward_messages.description: Resolve forward message nodes with get_forward_msg
expand_forward_messages.hint: The outer forward segment is always archived. This option additionally fetches and stores the forwarded node contents when the OneBot implementation supports it.

record_all_notice_events.description: Record all QQ group notice events
record_all_notice_events.hint: If disabled, the plugin still records recalls and message emoji reactions because they are core archive events.

capture_outgoing_messages.description: Archive bot messages after they are sent
capture_outgoing_messages.hint: Outgoing messages are archived without a platform message id because AstrBot does not expose it at this hook point.
